papers.title: Blockchain Metrics and Indicators in Cryptocurrency Trading
papers.abstract_summary: Constructs new trading indicators from Bitcoin blockchain mining data (hash rate, difficulty, cost per transaction). Hash Ribbon-inspired indicators perform well for locating buy signals with statistical advantage.
signal_ideas: Hash Ribbon indicator: buy when 30d hash rate MA crosses above 60d MA (miners recovering)
Mining difficulty momentum: rising difficulty = network confidence = bullish
Cost-per-transaction as network congestion proxy (high cost = high demand = bullish)
Hash rate z-score for extreme deviation detection

papers.title: Temporal Fusion Transformer-Based Trading Strategy for Multi-Crypto Assets Using On-Chain and Technical Indicators
papers.abstract_summary: TFT framework integrating on-chain metrics (SOPR, TVL, active addresses, exchange net flow, HODL waves) with technical indicators (RSI, MACD) for multi-crypto forecasting and signal-based trading.
signal_ideas: SOPR < 1 = holders selling at loss = capitulation buy signal
TVL rate of change as DeFi sentiment proxy
Active addresses momentum: acceleration precedes price moves
Exchange net flow: negative = coins leaving exchanges = accumulation = bullish
Realized Cap HODL Waves: shift from short-term to long-term holders = distribution/accumulation phases
Crypto Fear and Greed Index as contrarian overlay

papers.title: Synergistic Alpha: Forecasting Cryptocurrency Returns by Fusing On-Chain, Sentiment, and Market Data
papers.abstract_summary: Hybrid Transformer achieves 61.25% directional accuracy and Sharpe 1.58 on BTC. SHAP shows NVT Signal and social sentiment are top predictors beyond past returns.
signal_ideas: NVT Signal: high NVT = overvalued (sell), low NVT = undervalued (buy)
FinBERT social media sentiment score as leading indicator
On-chain + sentiment + market data fusion outperforms single-source

papers.title: On- and off-chain demand and supply drivers of Bitcoin price
papers.abstract_summary: ARDL model: off-chain demand pressures have significant long-run BTC price impact. On-chain demand matters in both timeframes. Whale trading impact is short-term only.
signal_ideas: Off-chain demand pressure (exchange volume, derivatives OI) as long-run price driver
On-chain demand pressure (active addresses, transaction count) for both timeframes
Whale transaction monitoring: significant short-term but weak long-run effect
Dual on/off-chain demand-supply decomposition for regime identification

papers.title: Explainable Patterns in Cryptocurrency Microstructure
papers.abstract_summary: Documents stable cross-asset LOB microstructure patterns on Binance Futures perpetuals (BTC, LTC, ETC, ENJ, ROSE). Same engineered order book features show similar predictive importance across assets via SHAP.
signal_ideas: Order flow imbalance (OFI): bid/ask volume change difference predicts short-term returns
Spread dynamics: widening spread = adverse selection = potential reversal signal
Portable universal microstructure feature library across crypto assets
CatBoost with direction-aware GMADL objective for LOB-based prediction
Flash crash detection via divergent taker vs maker strategy performance

papers.title: The Red Queen's Trap: Limits of Deep Evolution in High-Frequency Trading
papers.abstract_summary: Post-mortem of hybrid DRL/evolutionary HFT system with 70% capital decay. Key finding: model complexity without order-flow information asymmetry increases fragility.
signal_ideas: NEGATIVE RESULT: complexity without order-flow info asymmetry = systemic fragility
Order-flow data is necessary condition for overcoming microstructure friction
Training-vs-live APY divergence as overfitting detector

papers.title: A Comparative Analysis of Outlier Detection in Bitcoin Limit Order Books
papers.abstract_summary: Benchmark of 13 anomaly detection models on Bitcoin LOB. Empirical Covariance model achieves 6.70% gain vs buy-and-hold.
signal_ideas: LOB anomaly detection as trading signal: outlier bid/ask patterns predict moves
Empirical Covariance method for detecting manipulative LOB patterns
Anomaly-triggered entry/exit: trade only when LOB structure is statistically unusual

papers.title: Neural Hawkes: Non-Parametric Estimation and Causality Analysis in Cryptocurrency Markets
papers.abstract_summary: Hawkes process estimation for crypto microstructure. Extracts volume influence on BTC trade arrival rate and maps causality among 15 crypto pairs.
signal_ideas: Volume-arrival rate relationship: volume spikes influence future trade intensity
Cross-crypto causality network: which coins lead/lag in trade activity
Hawkes process for self-exciting order flow dynamics modeling

papers.title: Memory, Roughness, and Information Persistence in Financial Markets
papers.abstract_summary: Studies long-memory dynamics in 115 S&P500 stocks. Persistence measures rise during GFC/COVID, correlate with VIX. Cross-sectional persistence aggregates improve volatility forecasts.
signal_ideas: Volatility persistence measure (GPH d-hat): rising d = increasing uncertainty duration
Cross-sectional persistence aggregates as macro stress indicator (correlates with VIX)
Persistence-by-stress interaction: forecast gains strongest during elevated vol
Sectoral persistence divergence as rotation signal

papers.title: Continuous Timing Signals for Growth-Defensive Style Allocation
papers.abstract_summary: Smooth continuous score combining rate relief, SPY drawdown, VIX stress relief, and growth-crowding penalty. Achieves 19.24% CAGR, Sharpe 1.01.
signal_ideas: Rate relief signal: TNX (10Y yield) momentum as growth/defensive timing
SPY drawdown depth as stress regime indicator
High-VIX stress relief: mean reversion when VIX elevated
Growth-crowding penalty: fade growth when too crowded
Continuous smooth score (softplus + tanh + EWMA) replacing discrete regime labels

papers.title: Fundamentals of Perpetual Futures
papers.abstract_summary: No-arbitrage prices for perpetual futures. Crypto deviations from no-arb are larger than traditional markets, comove across currencies, diminish over time. Implied arbitrage yields high Sharpe.
signal_ideas: Perp-spot basis deviation from no-arb bound as mean-reversion signal
Cross-currency funding rate comovement: simultaneous contango/backwardation = crowded positioning
Long spot + short perp when basis exceeds no-arb threshold
Basis convergence speed as regime indicator (faster = more efficient market)

papers.title: Designing funding rates for perpetual futures in cryptocurrency markets
papers.abstract_summary: Mathematical framework for perpetual funding rates using path-dependent BSDEs. Shows how design affects price-target alignment.
signal_ideas: Path-dependent funding rate trajectory predicts future price alignment
Funding rate deviation from theoretical optimum as mispricing indicator

papers.title: BitMEX Funding Correlation with Bitcoin Exchange Rate
papers.abstract_summary: Proves heteroskedastic nature of funding rates. Establishes Granger causality from funding rates to BTC perpetual swap price. GARCH model for funding prediction.
signal_ideas: Funding rate Granger-causes perp swap price moves
GARCH-modeled funding rate volatility as positioning extreme indicator
Extreme positive funding = overleveraged longs = mean reversion opportunity
Funding rate as predictive tool for gauging market trend

papers.title: MadEvolve: Evolutionary Optimization of Trading Systems with LLMs
papers.abstract_summary: LLM-driven evolutionary optimization for BTC trading. Evolves feature sets, optimizes strategy components, jointly evolves pipeline with execution.
signal_ideas: LLM-evolved feature sets: automated discovery of optimal indicator combinations
Joint feature-pipeline + execution co-optimization outperforms sequential design
P-hacking probability quantification for backtest validation

papers.title: When Alpha Disappears: Decision-Time Leakage Benchmark for Financial Backtests
papers.abstract_summary: Benchmark diagnosing decision-time leakage. Centered temporal features and same-day-open execution with post-open info cause large inflation. Critical for backtest hygiene.
signal_ideas: METHODOLOGY: centered temporal features are a major source of look-ahead bias
Same-day-open execution with post-open daily bar info inflates results
Use t+1-open reference as clean benchmark for any backtest

papers.title: Cross-Market Alpha: Testing Short-Term Trading Factors via Double-Selection LASSO
papers.abstract_summary: Tests 191 short-term signals on S&P 500. Isolates 17 price-volume and microstructural signals with non-redundant risk premiums using LASSO controlling for 151 fundamental factors.
signal_ideas: 17 cross-market transferable price-volume signals with non-redundant alpha
Double-selection LASSO to isolate signals controlling for fundamentals
Short-term behavioral signals capture universal dynamics across markets
Dual-horizon framework: fast behavioral footprints + slow fundamental data

papers.title: Hubble: LLM-Driven Agentic Framework for Alpha Factor Discovery
papers.abstract_summary: LLM-guided alpha mining with AST sandbox, dual-channel RAG, family-aware selection. Top factors: range, volatility, trend. Out-of-sample: range and volatility factors retain positive IC.
signal_ideas: Range-based alpha factors: (high-low)/close ratios as volatility-regime signals
Volatility family factors: realized vol ratios across timeframes
Family-level diversity prevents crowding into volume-only motifs
Range and volatility factors more robust out-of-sample than trend factors

papers.title: Causal and Predictive Modeling of Short-Horizon Market Risk and Systematic Alpha Generation
papers.abstract_summary: Hybrid ML ensemble predicting 5-day S&P 500 drawdowns using cross-asset features. Achieves Sharpe 2.51, CAPM alpha +0.28, beta 0.51.
signal_ideas: 5-day drawdown prediction using cross-asset feature set as risk-off signal
Cross-asset features: equity vol + fixed income + FX + commodity + VIX term structure
VIX, credit spreads, yield curve slope as top crash predictors
Hybrid neural network + tree-based voting ensemble for regime identification

papers.title: MemGuard-Alpha: Detecting Memorization-Contaminated Signals in LLM-Based Financial Forecasting
papers.abstract_summary: Framework to detect LLM memorization in financial signals. Clean signals yield 14.48 bps/day vs 2.13 bps for tainted (7x). CMMD achieves Sharpe 4.11 vs 2.76 unfiltered.
signal_ideas: Cross-Model Memorization Disagreement: signals where different-cutoff models agree are genuine
In-sample accuracy rising + out-of-sample falling = memorization red flag
Clean signal filtering improves Sharpe by 49%

papers.title: Extracting Price Signals from Term Structure of Commodity and Credit Markets
papers.abstract_summary: Applies Austrian Business Cycle Theory to commodity and credit term structures. Yield curve inversions and commodity contango/backwardation as leading cycle indicators.
signal_ideas: Commodity term structure slope (contango vs backwardation) as business cycle signal
Credit term structure inversion timing vs commodity term structure for lead-lag
Joint commodity + credit term structure divergence as macro regime change detector
Yield curve inversion depth and duration as recession probability

papers.title: Global Uncertainty and BRICS+ Equity Markets: Spillovers from VIX, Geopolitical Risk, and U.S. Macro-Financial Shocks
papers.abstract_summary: VAR analysis of VIX, geopolitical risk, inflation expectations, and term spread transmission to emerging markets. VIX is both receiver and transmitter of shocks.
signal_ideas: VIX as bidirectional shock transmitter: spikes propagate to and from emerging markets
U.S. term spread (T10Y3M) shocks transmit quickly but dissipate in days
T5YIE (5Y inflation expectations) as quick-impact macro signal
Geopolitical risk shocks are short-lived on yields and equity

papers.title: The Extremity Premium: Sentiment Regimes and Adverse Selection in Cryptocurrency Markets
papers.abstract_summary: Documents that extreme Fear & Greed regimes exhibit significantly higher spreads than neutral periods. Effect replicates on ETH and across 6 of 7 market cycles.
signal_ideas: Extremity premium: extreme fear AND extreme greed both predict wider spreads (higher uncertainty)
Within-volatility-quintile sentiment extremity as adverse selection signal
Granger causality from uncertainty to spreads (F=211)
Replicates across BTC and ETH and 6/7 market cycles

key_themes: On-chain metrics (SOPR, NVT, MVRV, hash rate, exchange net flow) as crypto-specific signals
Microstructure features (OFI, LOB imbalance, spread dynamics) transferable across crypto assets
Funding rate and perpetual basis as positioning/sentiment indicators
Cross-asset feature sets (VIX, credit spreads, yield curve) for drawdown prediction
LLM-driven alpha discovery and memorization contamination filtering
Backtest hygiene: decision-time leakage detection, p-hacking quantification
Volatility persistence and rough-volatility measures as stress regime indicators
Sentiment extremity premium: extreme F&G regimes predict adverse selection
